creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
i don't think the ld(1) manual should be excluded in case the GOLD option was
enabled. the GOLD release note [1] states, that:

"gold does not yet have any internal documentation.  I plan to work on
that.

gold does not yet have a manual.  For now the GNU linker manual should
be accurate for those features which gold supports--which is to say,
many of them but not all of them."

cheers.
alex

[1] http://sourceware.org/ml/binutils/2008-03/msg00162.html
-- 
a13x
